CustomField.inlineHelpText: ◼ URGENT: The software or printer is NOT operational. NO workaround exists and/or the business is severely impacted. ◼ HIGH: A major software or printer function is inoperable, but work can continue with moderate impact to business operations. ◼ MEDIUM: An issue which does not seriously affect business operation. ◼LOW: Just a question and response is not needed for a day or two.
